title: Robots in Our Lives
passage:
Robots in Our Lives

Today, we have many robots in our world. Some robots help us at home. For example, there is a small robot that cleans the floor. It is called a vacuum robot. It is round and moves around the rooms to clean dust. It can clean when you are sleeping or at work. Many people buy this robot because it saves time. It makes their lives easy.

Other robots work in hospitals. These robots are very useful. They carry food and medicine to patients. They can also help doctors and nurses. In some big hospitals, robots clean the rooms with a special light. This light kills bad germs. Because of this, hospitals are safer for everyone.

We also have robots in schools. These robots help children learn. For example, a small robot can speak English with students. Children like learning with robots because they are fun and they play games together. The robots never get tired, so they can repeat words many times. This helps children remember their lessons.

Finally, we have robots in big factories. These robots are very strong. They can build cars and lift heavy boxes. They work very fast and do not make mistakes. They can work all day and night without stopping. This helps companies make things quickly and cheaply.

In the future, we will have more smart robots. Some people think robots will drive cars and buses. Other people think robots will cook all our meals. Robots are very helpful, but they cannot do everything. They do not have feelings like love or sadness. They still need humans to turn them on, program them, and fix them when they break.

options.NOT GIVEN: If there is no information on this

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài (A1-A2)

1. Tìm từ khóa trực tiếp: Ở trình độ này, các câu hỏi sử dụng từ vựng giống hệt trong bài đọc (ít paraphrase). Hãy gạch chân từ khóa trong câu hỏi và tìm từ đó trong bài đọc.

2. True/False/Not Given: Đọc kỹ từng câu. Nếu thông tin không có trong bài (ví dụ: việc học 'math' ở Q7), hãy chọn ngay NOT GIVEN.

3. Điền từ vào chỗ trống: Hãy chú ý giới hạn từ (NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS). Từ cần điền phải được lấy chính xác từ bài đọc, không thay đổi dạng của từ.
